meta.name: Federico Pian Portfolio
meta.description: Creative developer portfolio showcasing projects with flowing light background, mouse image trail, and brutalist-inspired typography

color.contrast_strategy: high contrast text on light surface, inverted on dark mode

typography.font_style_notes: Custom Safiro font — geometric sans-serif with clean terminals. All weights at 400 (regular). Fluid sizing using min()/vw.

spacing.section_rhythm: generous vertical spacing, 4rem+ section gaps, tight internal card spacing

layout.grid_system: 12-column CSS grid for header, flexbox for content
layout.alignment_tendency: asymmetric — left-heavy for labels, centered for headings, justified for body

shape.border_usage: subtle 1px borders on interactive elements only
shape.divider_style: thin inline separators between meta items

elevation.depth_cues: z-index layering, color transitions, no shadows

motion.entrance_pattern: fade + slight translateY on card reveal
motion.philosophy: smooth glide — snappy but polished, GSAP-powered transitions

components.button_style: outlined pill buttons with expand-on-hover icon, animated label swap
components.navigation_pattern: side arrow buttons with duplicate-icon hover slide, keyboard/touch/wheel support
components.list_style: 5-column horizontal project list with alternating top/bottom positions
components.component_notes: Progress circle with SVG stroke-dasharray. CTA buttons with label slide-up + icon crossfade. Nav arrows with duplicate SVG slide on hover.

visual_language.ornamentation: subtle accents — flowing light bg, cursor trail
visual_language.whitespace_usage: generous breathing room, content anchors to edges
visual_language.visual_weight_distribution: top-heavy headings, bottom-anchored meta, wide-open center
visual_language.focal_strategy: progressive reveal — project title dominates, details follow
visual_language.contrast_level: high — dark text on light surface, stark typographic hierarchy
visual_language.texture_usage: noise overlay in dark mode only

composition.hierarchy_method: scale contrast — massive project titles vs small meta labels
composition.flow_direction: horizontal — projects slide left/right, labels frame sides
composition.grouping_strategy: spatial — related metadata grouped with dividers, CTA separated by space
composition.negative_space_role: active framing — empty space directs focus to active content

imagery.photo_treatment: full-color, circle-cropped preview, rectangular in trail
imagery.graphic_elements: flowing metaball light background, circular progress indicator
imagery.pattern_usage: noise texture in dark mode overlay
imagery.image_shape: circular preview (pill), rectangular trail cards (7px radius)

interaction_feel.feedback_style: immediate visual response — color shifts, scale changes
interaction_feel.hover_behavior: expand/slide animations on buttons, scale on preview image
interaction_feel.microinteraction_density: high — hover states on all interactive elements, flowing bg, cursor trail

overview.fallback_strategy: static background color, hide trail, disable canvas on low-end

background_effects.description: Large flowing radial gradients (metaballs) drifting across canvas, colors lerp per-project

3d_elements.description: Original site uses Three.js for background, replaced with Canvas 2D for standalone compatibility

text_effects.description: Pure typographic impact — no text animation effects

cursor_effects.description: Dense ribbon of project images follows cursor with knife-cut slide-reveal + scale-in animation. Images placed every 58px along path, 12-image pool, cubic ease-out scale 0→1 over 24 frames, image slides in from opposite direction of movement.

image_effects.description: Circular preview image scales to 1.1 on hover with 1s ease transition

canvas_drawings.description: Five large radial gradient orbs drift across full-viewport canvas, lerping colors and positions. Colors transition when project changes.

svg_animations.description: Circular progress indicator animates stroke-dashoffset when switching projects

visual_effects.composite_notes: Three effect layers stack: (1) Canvas metaball background at lowest z-index, (2) dark mode noise texture overlay via CSS animation, (3) mouse image trail at z-index 100. Canvas and trail use separate requestAnimationFrame loops. Dark mode applies CSS filter inversion to background. Original site uses Three.js/TresJS with custom GLSL shaders for background — simplified to Canvas 2D metaballs in standalone version.
